name: Fruit Cup
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Orange - peeled, sectioned and diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the frozen lemonade concentrate in a large bowl.
2. Add the prepared fruits to the bowl and mix lightly.
3. Chill the mixture.
4. Garnish each serving with chopped walnuts.
NOTE: The skins of apple and peach may be removed if desired.
Calories per 2/3 cup serving: About 95
Source: FOOD -- by U.S. Department of Agriculture
